title: HackTheBox: Knife (example)
summary: Exploit the PHP 8.1 dev backdoor header to obtain a shell and escalate with a misconfigured gem binary.

title: TryHackMe: RootMe
summary: Web upload bypass, simple PHP reverse shell and cron-based privilege escalation.

title: HackTheBox: Pikaboo
summary: Pivot through a hidden service using knockd, mount NFS and abuse writable exports.

title: VulnHub: Tr0ll 1
summary: Classic enumeration-heavy box: hidden files, wordlist tricks and setuid escalation.

title: VulnHub: BlueTorrent
summary: Chain misconfigurations in a custom torrent service and crack weak crypto for root.
